message:
test(harness): add mounted-path E2E coverage for EXT4_IOC_GETVERSION (bd-devbv)

Adds ext4_fuse_ioctl_getversion_via_mounted_path test that exercises
the ioctl dispatch path via Python fcntl. Handles both:
- Success case: returns valid inode generation number
- Transport-layer skip: ENOTTY/EINVAL if kernel doesn't forward

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
